source_note: JP→zh/en 機械翻訳 (Claude opus, D-136)。figure 問は図を参照し OCR 混入を除去した stem_jp_clean を併記。出典は IPA 過去問 (改変=OCR修復+翻訳)。

stem.zh: 在制定零售业的商业战略时，将"维持优质客户"设定为 CSF（Critical Success Factor，关键成功因素）。为评估该 CSF 的达成程度，最适合采用的分析方法是哪一个？
stem.en: In formulating a business strategy for a retail business, "retaining valuable customers" was set as a CSF (Critical Success Factor). Which of the following is the most appropriate analysis to use for evaluating the degree of achievement of this CSF?

ア.zh: 按客户进行的 RFM 分析
ア.en: RFM analysis by customer

イ.zh: 对新客户的人口统计分析（demographic analysis）
イ.en: Demographic analysis of new customers

ウ.zh: 对新商品的 POS 分析
ウ.en: POS analysis of new products

エ.zh: 按门店、按商品的销售额 ABC 分析
エ.en: ABC analysis of sales by store and by product

2014h26h-q002.stem_jp_clean: PC用のOSを情報家電のOSに採用することがある。その目的として,最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 有时会将PC用的操作系统采用于信息家电的操作系统。作为其目的，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: An OS designed for PCs is sometimes adopted as the OS for an information appliance (smart home electronics). Which of the following is the most appropriate purpose of doing so?

ア.zh: 削减运行所需的内存
ア.en: Reducing the memory required for operation

イ.zh: 降低成为外部攻击对象的风险
イ.en: Lowering the risk of becoming a target of external attacks

ウ.zh: 提升处理速度
ウ.en: Improving processing speed

エ.zh: 缩短软件的开发周期
エ.en: Shortening the software development period

stem.zh: SOA（Service Oriented Architecture，面向服务的架构）是一种通过组合服务来构建系统的思想。作为采用 SOA 的优点，适当的是哪一项？
stem.en: SOA (Service Oriented Architecture) is an approach to building systems by combining services. Which of the following is an appropriate advantage of adopting SOA?

ア.zh: 系统的处理速度得到提升。
ア.en: The processing speed of the system improves.

イ.zh: 系统的安全性得到加强。
イ.en: The security of the system is strengthened.

ウ.zh: 无需对系统使用者进行培训。
ウ.en: Training for system users becomes unnecessary.

エ.zh: 能够进行具有灵活性的系统开发。
エ.en: Flexible system development becomes possible.

stem.zh: 软件的设计质量与设计者的技能、设计方法、设计工具等相关。在整理影响质量的各事项之间的关系时使用的、形状类似鱼骨的图形，其名称中合适的是哪一个？
stem.en: The design quality of software is related to the designer's skills, design methods, design tools, and so on. Which of the following is the appropriate name for the diagram shaped like a fish skeleton, used to organize the relationships among factors that affect quality?

ア.zh: 箭线图
ア.en: Arrow diagram

イ.zh: 因果图
イ.en: Cause-and-effect diagram

ウ.zh: 帕累托图
ウ.en: Pareto chart

エ.zh: 矩阵图
エ.en: Matrix diagram

stem.zh: 作为符合可追溯性的事例，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate example of traceability?

ア.zh: 利用互联网和 Web 技术，将计算机应用于教育。
ア.en: Applying computers to education by using the Internet and Web technologies.

イ.zh: 公司内部不设开发部门，而将全部开发业务委托给外部专业企业。
イ.en: Entrusting all development work entirely to an external specialist company instead of maintaining an in-house development department.

ウ.zh: 在整个组织内共享个人的知识和信息，并加以有效利用以提升业绩。
ウ.en: Sharing individuals' knowledge and information across the whole organization and using it effectively to improve business performance.

エ.zh: 凭借贴在肉类或鱼类上的标签，可以确认从生产到销售的全过程履历。
エ.en: Being able to trace the history from production to sale based on the label attached to meat or fish.

stem.zh: 在开发信息系统时所创建的业务模型表现的是哪一项？
stem.en: What does a business model created during the development of an information system represent?

ア.zh: 现行业务系统的系统需求
ア.en: The system requirements of the current business system

イ.zh: 现行业务流程与计划引入的 ERP 软件包所假定的业务流程之间的差异
イ.en: The differences between the current business processes and the business processes assumed by the ERP package to be introduced

ウ.zh: 作为系统开发对象的业务的机制和流程
ウ.en: The structure and processes of the business that is the target of system development

エ.zh: 新开发的业务系统的系统需求
エ.en: The system requirements of the newly developed business system

stem.zh:
关于系统采购，与 a、b 相对应的描述的恰当组合是哪一个？
A 公司在采购新系统时，为了获取 a 而向供应商提交了 RFI（信息征询书）。随后，为了获取 b 而向供应商提交了 RFP（提案邀请书），进行了采购对象的选定。
stem.en:
Regarding system procurement, which is the appropriate combination of descriptions corresponding to a and b?
When Company A procured a new system, it presented an RFI (Request For Information) to vendors in order to obtain a. After that, it presented an RFP (Request For Proposal) to vendors in order to obtain b, and selected the procurement source.

ア.zh: a：技术动向调查书 b：提案书
ア.en: a: technology trend survey report  b: proposal

イ.zh: a：技术动向调查书 b：保密协议
イ.en: a: technology trend survey report  b: non-disclosure agreement

ウ.zh: a：财务报表 b：提案书
ウ.en: a: financial statements  b: proposal

エ.zh: a：提案书 b：技术动向调查书
エ.en: a: proposal  b: technology trend survey report

stem.zh: 在企业高管职位中，统管信息系统的最高负责人是哪一个？
stem.en: Among corporate executive positions, which one is the chief officer responsible for overseeing information systems?

ア.zh: CEO
ア.en: CEO

イ.zh: CFO
イ.en: CFO

ウ.zh: CIO
ウ.en: CIO

エ.zh: COO
エ.en: COO

stem.zh: 作为 PPM 的应用实例，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate application example of PPM?

ア.zh: 通过将部分业务委托给外部，把经营资源集中到核心业务上。
ア.en: Concentrate management resources on core operations by outsourcing part of the business to external parties.

イ.zh: 明确各项业务的战略定位，考虑经营资源的最优配置。
イ.en: Clarify the strategic positioning of each business and consider the optimal allocation of management resources.

ウ.zh: 从根本上重新审视工作流程与方法，变革为最理想的业务形态。
ウ.en: Fundamentally review the flow and methods of work, and transform them into the most desirable form of operations.

エ.zh: 做好准备，即使在发生大规模灾害等情况时，业务也能够持续运行。
エ.en: Prepare so that the business can continue even when a large-scale disaster or similar event occurs.

2014h26h-q010.stem_jp_clean: 個人情報取扱事業者が個人情報を第三者に渡した事例のうち, 個人情報保護法において, 本人の同意が必要なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在个人信息处理经营者将个人信息提供给第三方的事例中，根据《个人信息保护法》，需要取得本人同意的是哪一项？
stem.en: Among the cases in which a Personal Information Handling Business Operator provided personal information to a third party, which one requires the consent of the individual under the Personal Information Protection Act?

ア.zh: 因警方依据搜查令请求提供信息，故将员工的个人信息提供给了警方。
ア.en: The police requested information based on a search warrant, so an employee's personal information was provided to them.

イ.zh: 将有遭受虐待之虞的儿童家庭的信息，在儿童咨询所、警方、学校等之间共享。
イ.en: Information about a household where a child may be at risk of abuse was shared among the child guidance center, the police, the school, and others.

ウ.zh: 因收到来自连锁加盟（特许经营）组织总部的请求，加盟店将其收集的顾客个人信息提供了出去。
ウ.en: Upon receiving a request from the headquarters of a franchise organization, the member store provided the customer personal information it had collected.

エ.zh: 将黑社会等反社会势力的信息以及实施业务妨害行为的恶意人员的信息，在企业之间共享。
エ.en: Information about anti-social forces such as organized crime groups, and about malicious individuals who interfere with business operations, was shared among companies.

stem.zh: 规定了员工工资、工作时间、休假等方面最低标准的法律是哪一项？
stem.en: Which law establishes minimum standards for employees' wages, working hours, leave, and similar matters?

ア.zh: 公司法
ア.en: Companies Act

イ.zh: 民法
イ.en: Civil Code

ウ.zh: 劳动基准法
ウ.en: Labor Standards Act

エ.zh: 劳动者派遣法
エ.en: Worker Dispatch Act

stem.zh: 关于 QR 码的特征，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate characteristic of a QR code?

ア.zh: 可以容纳除汉字以外的所有字符和符号。
ア.en: It can store all characters and symbols except kanji.

イ.zh: 可容纳的信息量与条码相同。
イ.en: The amount of information it can hold is the same as that of a barcode.

ウ.zh: 从上下左右任意方向都可以读取该码。
ウ.en: The code can be read from any direction: up, down, left, or right.

エ.zh: 它是将条码叠加三层而成的二维结构。
エ.en: It has a two-dimensional structure formed by stacking three layers of barcodes.

2014h26h-q013.stem_jp_clean: インターネットに接続しているコンピュータ環境において, 不正アクセス禁止法で規制されている, 不正アクセスを助長する行為に該当するものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在连接到互联网的计算机环境中，下列哪一项属于《禁止非法访问法》所规制的、助长非法访问的行为？
stem.en: In a computer environment connected to the Internet, which of the following is an act that facilitates unauthorized access and is regulated by the Unauthorized Access Prohibition Act?

ア.zh: 编写并散布一种非法骗取住址、姓名等个人信息的程序。
ア.en: Create and distribute a program that fraudulently steals personal information such as addresses and names.

イ.zh: 将商用音乐内容置于博客上，使不特定的多数人可以下载。
イ.en: Make commercial music content available on a blog so that an unspecified large number of people can download it.

ウ.zh: 未经本人同意，口头将他人的 ID 和密码告知第三方。
ウ.en: Verbally tell a third party someone else's ID and password without the person's consent.

エ.zh: 在电子公告板上发帖，煽动对特定网站进行大量访问。
エ.en: Post a message on an electronic bulletin board inciting a large volume of access to a specific website.

stem.zh: 在 ABC 分析中使用的图，最恰当的是哪一个？
stem.en: Which chart is appropriate for use in ABC analysis?

ア.zh: 控制图
ア.en: Control chart

イ.zh: 散点图
イ.en: Scatter plot

ウ.zh: 因果图
ウ.en: Cause-and-effect diagram

エ.zh: 帕累托图
エ.en: Pareto chart

stem.zh: 用于表示目标业务的处理过程和信息流的图表是哪一个？
stem.en: Which diagram is used to represent the processing flow and the flow of information in a target business operation?

ア.zh: DFD
ア.en: DFD

イ.zh: E-R 图
イ.en: E-R Diagram

ウ.zh: UML 类图
ウ.en: UML Class Diagram

エ.zh: 因果图（特性要因图）
エ.en: Cause-and-effect diagram (Ishikawa diagram)

2014h26h-q016.stem_jp_clean: 経営管理システムのうち, 顧客生涯価値を最大化することを目標の一つとするものはどれか。ここで, 顧客生涯価値とは, 顧客が生涯を通じてその企業にもたらすことが予想される利益の大きさのことである。

stem.zh: 在下列经营管理系统中，将客户终身价值最大化作为目标之一的是哪一个？这里所说的客户终身价值，是指预期客户在其一生中为该企业带来的利益大小。
stem.en: Among the following business management systems, which one has maximizing customer lifetime value as one of its goals? Here, customer lifetime value refers to the amount of profit a customer is expected to bring to the company over their lifetime.

ア.zh: CRM
ア.en: CRM

イ.zh: ERP
イ.en: ERP

ウ.zh: SCM
ウ.en: SCM

エ.zh: SFA
エ.en: SFA

stem.zh: PL 法（产品责任法）的保护对象是哪一个？
stem.en: Who is the party protected by the PL Act (Product Liability Act)?

ア.zh: 零售商
ア.en: Retailer

イ.zh: 消费者
イ.en: Consumer

ウ.zh: 制造商
ウ.en: Manufacturer

エ.zh: 进口商
エ.en: Importer

2014h26h-q018.stem_jp_clean: インターネットショッピングのロングテール現象の説明として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 关于网络购物中长尾现象的说明，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of the long tail phenomenon in internet shopping?

ア.zh: 用销售额大的商品所获得的利润，来弥补销售额小的商品所造成的亏损。
ア.en: Using the profit obtained from high-sales products to cover the losses from low-sales products.

イ.zh: 由于无法拿起商品实物查看，与店铺销售相比，从开始销售到成为热门商品所需的时间变得更长。
イ.en: Because customers cannot pick up and examine products in person, it takes longer than store sales for a product to become a hit after it goes on sale.

ウ.zh: 由于销售所需的成本较低，通过经营大量销售额小的商品就能够获取利润。
ウ.en: Because the costs required for sales are low, profits can be made by handling a large number of low-sales products.

エ.zh: 受博客上所写评价等的影响，商品上市后立即热销，且即使时间推移也不衰退。
エ.en: Due to the influence of evaluations written on blogs and so on, a product sells well immediately after release and does not decline even as time passes.

2014h26h-q019.stem_jp_clean: 国民生活の安心や安全を損なうような企業の法令違反行為の事実を, 労働者が公益通報者保護法で定められた通報先に通報した場合, その労働者は同法によって解雇などの不利益を受けないよう保護される。 次の労働者の行為のうち, 労働者が公益通報者保護法の保護を受けられる事例はどれか。

stem.zh: 当劳动者将损害国民生活安心与安全的企业违法行为事实，向举报人保护法所规定的举报受理机构进行举报时，该劳动者依据该法受到保护，不会遭受解雇等不利待遇。在下列劳动者的行为中，劳动者能够获得举报人保护法保护的事例是哪一个？
stem.en: When a worker reports facts of a company's legal violations that harm the safety and security of citizens' lives to a reporting destination prescribed by the Whistleblower Protection Act, that worker is protected under the Act from disadvantages such as dismissal. Among the following worker actions, which is a case where the worker can receive protection under the Whistleblower Protection Act?

ア.zh: 虽然违反了禁止泄露企业机密的工作规则，但将工作单位的应举报事实，按照法律规定向所确定的举报受理机构进行了实名举报。
ア.en: Although it violated the workplace rules prohibiting leakage of corporate secrets, the worker reported a fact subject to reporting at their workplace, under their real name, to a reporting destination established under the Act.

イ.zh: 将与工作单位业务无关的、工作单位同事在私生活中的违法事实，按照法律规定向所确定的举报受理机构进行了实名举报。
イ.en: The worker reported, under their real name, a fact of a legal violation in the private life of a colleague at their workplace that is unrelated to the workplace's business, to a reporting destination established under the Act.

ウ.zh: 为确认工作单位的不当行为是否属于应举报事实，向律师进行了咨询。
ウ.en: To confirm whether an improper act at their workplace falls under the facts subject to reporting, the worker consulted a lawyer.

エ.zh: 在不特定多数人可以浏览的网站上，发布了工作单位的违法事实。
エ.en: The worker posted facts of their workplace's legal violations on a website that an unspecified large number of people can view.

stem.zh: 计划面向全国的业务人员开展关于销售预测系统使用方法的培训。使用 e-Learning（在线学习）开展培训所能获得的好处是哪一项？
stem.en: A training program on how to use a sales forecasting system is being planned for business staff nationwide. Which of the following is a benefit obtained by using e-Learning for the training?

ア.zh: 业务人员可以直接听设计负责人讲解系统内容，并能当场提问。
ア.en: Business staff can take the course on the system's content directly from the design staff and ask questions on the spot.

イ.zh: 业务人员可以利用自己业务的空闲时间，在喜欢的时候参加学习。
イ.en: Business staff can take the course whenever they like, using the free time in their own work.

ウ.zh: 多名业务人员可以同时在场，就系统的使用方法交换意见。
ウ.en: Multiple business staff can be present together and exchange opinions about how to use the system.

エ.zh: 可以把业务人员集中到一处，一次性进行培训。
エ.en: Business staff can be gathered together in one place and trained all at once.

stem.zh: 系统化计划的制定包含在软件生命周期的哪个流程中？
stem.en: In which process of the software life cycle is the formulation of a systemization plan included?

ア.zh: 运行
ア.en: Operation

イ.zh: 开发
イ.en: Development

ウ.zh: 规划
ウ.en: Planning

エ.zh: 需求定义
エ.en: Requirements definition

stem.zh: 关于 BPM（Business Process Management，业务流程管理）的特征，最适当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is the most appropriate characteristic of BPM (Business Process Management)?

ア.zh: 为了解决业务课题，需要引入符合国际标准的管理机制。
ア.en: To solve business issues, it requires introducing a management system that complies with international standards.

イ.zh: 按流程逐个分析整理业务流程，找出问题点，持续改善业务流程。
イ.en: It analyzes and organizes the business flow process by process, identifies problems, and continuously improves the business flow.

ウ.zh: 将业务流程的一部分委托给外部供应商，从而推进效率化。
ウ.en: It promotes efficiency by outsourcing part of the business process to an external vendor.

エ.zh: 从根本上重新审视并重新设计业务流程。
エ.en: It fundamentally reviews and redesigns the business process.

2014h26h-q023.stem_jp_clean: 部品製造会社 A では製造工程における不良品発生を減らすために, 業績評価指標の一つとして歩留り率を設定した。バランススコアカードの四つの視点のうち, 歩留り率を設定する視点として, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 零件制造公司 A 为减少制造工序中不良品的产生，将成品率设定为绩效评价指标之一。在平衡计分卡的四个视角中，应将成品率设定在哪个视角最为合适？
stem.en: To reduce the occurrence of defective products in its manufacturing process, parts manufacturer A set the yield rate as one of its performance evaluation indicators. Among the four perspectives of the Balanced Scorecard, which is the most appropriate perspective under which to set the yield rate?

ア.zh: 学习与成长
ア.en: Learning and growth

イ.zh: 业务流程
イ.en: Business process

ウ.zh: 客户
ウ.en: Customer

エ.zh: 财务
エ.en: Financial

stem.zh: 保护商业秘密的法律是哪一个？
stem.en: Which law protects trade secrets?

ア.zh: 实用新型法
ア.en: Utility Model Act

イ.zh: 著作权法
イ.en: Copyright Act

ウ.zh: 专利法
ウ.en: Patent Act

エ.zh: 反不正当竞争法
エ.en: Unfair Competition Prevention Act

stem.zh: 作为符合 OJT（在岗培训）的事例，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate example of OJT (On-the-Job Training)?

ア.zh: 为提升新任管理人员的管理能力，举办了学习会。
ア.en: Held a study session to improve the management skills of newly appointed managers.

イ.zh: 为加深调入人员对总务手续的理解，用具体事例进行了讲解。
イ.en: Explained general affairs procedures using concrete examples to deepen a transferred employee's understanding.

ウ.zh: 为加深销售人员对销售信息系统的理解，举办了说明会。
ウ.en: Held an information session to deepen sales staff's understanding of the sales information system.

エ.zh: 为提升下属的企划立案能力，命其制定团队的销售计划。
エ.en: To improve a subordinate's planning ability, instructed them to draw up the team's sales plan.

2014h26h-q026.stem_jp_clean: ソフトウェアライフサイクルを, 企画, 要件定義, 開発, 運用のプロセスに分けたとき, 要件定義プロセスの段階で確認又は検証するものはどれか。

stem.zh: 将软件生命周期划分为策划、需求定义、开发、运用这几个过程时，在需求定义过程的阶段进行确认或验证的内容是哪一项？
stem.en: When the software life cycle is divided into the processes of planning, requirements definition, development, and operation, which of the following is confirmed or verified during the requirements definition process stage?

ア.zh: 系统需求与软件需求之间的一致性和可追溯性
ア.en: Consistency and traceability between system requirements and software requirements

イ.zh: 针对软件需求的软件设计的可实现性
イ.en: Feasibility of the software design with respect to the software requirements

ウ.zh: 从用户或客户的需要及期望来看业务需求的妥当性
ウ.en: Validity of the business requirements as seen from the needs and wishes of users or customers

エ.zh: 满足所分配需求的软件项的可实现性
エ.en: Feasibility of the software item that satisfies the allocated requirements

2014h26h-q027.stem_jp_clean: 外部技術の導入手法の一つとして, 企業が互いに有する特許の実施権を相互に許諾するものはどれか。

stem.zh: 作为引入外部技术的方法之一，企业之间相互许可彼此持有的专利的实施权，指的是哪一项？
stem.en: As one method of introducing external technology, which of the following refers to companies mutually granting each other the right to use the patents they each hold?

ア.zh: 联盟（Alliance）
ア.en: Alliance

イ.zh: 交叉许可（Cross-license）
イ.en: Cross-license

ウ.zh: 合资企业（Joint venture）
ウ.en: Joint venture

エ.zh: 特许权使用费（Royalty）
エ.en: Royalty

stem.zh: 关于并行工程的目的，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate purpose of concurrent engineering?

ア.zh: 缩短开发周期
ア.en: Shortening the development period

イ.zh: 提升所开发产品的性能
イ.en: Improving the performance of the product being developed

ウ.zh: 提升所开发产品的质量
ウ.en: Improving the quality of the product being developed

エ.zh: 提高生产工序的成品率
エ.en: Improving the yield rate of the production process

stem.zh: 下列哪一项是著作权法保护的对象？
stem.en: Which of the following is protected under the Copyright Act?

ア.zh: 形状或颜色新颖的书桌设计
ア.en: A desk design with a novel shape or color

イ.zh: 利用自然规律、技术上全新的机制
イ.en: A technically new mechanism that utilizes a law of nature

ウ.zh: 新上市商品的名称
ウ.en: The name of a newly launched product

エ.zh: 拍摄风景的照片
エ.en: A photograph of scenery

2014h26h-q030.stem_jp_clean: 「製品」「価格」「流通」「販売促進」の四つを構成要素とするマーケティング手法はどれか。

stem.zh: 以“产品”“价格”“渠道”“销售促进”这四项作为构成要素的营销方法是哪一个？
stem.en: Which marketing approach uses the four elements of "product," "price," "place (distribution)," and "sales promotion"?

ア.zh: 社会营销
ア.en: Social marketing

イ.zh: 直复营销
イ.en: Direct marketing

ウ.zh: 营销渠道
ウ.en: Marketing channel

エ.zh: 营销组合
エ.en: Marketing mix

stem.zh: 关于系统审计对象的描述，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description regarding the scope of a systems audit?

ア.zh: 不将一般民营企业的信息系统作为审计对象。
ア.en: Information systems of general private-sector companies are not subject to the audit.

イ.zh: 不将未使用互联网的信息系统作为审计对象。
イ.en: Information systems that do not use the Internet are not subject to the audit.

ウ.zh: 不将会计以外的业务作为审计对象。
ウ.en: Business operations other than accounting are not subject to the audit.

エ.zh: 不将未使用信息系统的业务作为审计对象。
エ.en: Business operations that do not use information systems are not subject to the audit.

2014h26h-q032.stem_jp_clean:
次の記述 a〜d のうち, システム利用者にとって使いやすい画面を設計するために考慮するものだけを全て挙げたものはどれか。
a 障害が発生したときの修復時間
b 操作方法の覚えやすさ
c プッシュボタンの配置
d 文字のサイズや色

stem.zh:
在以下记述 a～d 中，仅列出在设计便于系统使用者操作的界面时需要考虑的项目的选项是哪一个。
a 发生故障时的修复时间
b 操作方法是否易于记忆
c 按钮的布局
d 文字的大小和颜色
stem.en:
Among the following descriptions a to d, which option lists only all of the items that should be considered when designing a screen that is easy for system users to use?
a The repair time when a failure occurs
b How easy the operation method is to remember
c The layout of push buttons
d The size and color of characters

ア.zh: a, b, c
ア.en: a, b, c

イ.zh: a, b, d
イ.en: a, b, d

ウ.zh: a, c, d
ウ.en: a, c, d

エ.zh: b, c, d
エ.en: b, c, d

stem.zh: 下列哪一项属于 IT 服务管理的流程？
stem.en: Which of the following falls under a process of IT service management?

ア.zh: 针对开发中的程序，根据缺陷的发生情况等来评估质量。
ア.en: For a program under development, evaluate its quality based on factors such as the occurrence of defects.

イ.zh: 针对运行中的系统，由独立的第三方审计其运维方式是否存在问题。
イ.en: For a system in operation, have an independent third party audit whether there are any problems with the way it is operated.

ウ.zh: 为使系统开发项目按计划完成，评估其进度状况。
ウ.en: To ensure a system development project is completed as scheduled, evaluate its progress status.

エ.zh: 基于系统的运行实绩，评估所提供服务的级别。
エ.en: Based on the system's operational results, evaluate the level of the service being provided.

2014h26h-q034.stem_jp_clean: 開発者Aさんは, 入力データが意図されたとおりに処理されるかを, プログラムの内部構造を分析し確認している。 現在Aさんが行っているテストはどれか。

stem.zh: 开发者A正在分析程序的内部结构，确认输入数据是否按预期被处理。A目前进行的是哪种测试？
stem.en: Developer A is analyzing the internal structure of a program to verify that input data is processed as intended. Which test is A currently performing?

ア.zh: 系统测试
ア.en: System testing

イ.zh: 自顶向下测试
イ.en: Top-down testing

ウ.zh: 黑盒测试
ウ.en: Black-box testing

エ.zh: 白盒测试
エ.en: White-box testing

2014h26h-q035.stem_jp_clean: ソフトウェアのテストで使用するブラックボックステストにおけるテストケースの作り方として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在软件测试中使用的黑盒测试中，编写测试用例的方法，哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate way to design test cases for black-box testing used in software testing?

ア.zh: 选择测试数据，使所有分支至少被执行一次。
ア.en: Select test data so that every branch is executed at least once.

イ.zh: 选择测试数据，使所有分支条件的组合都被执行。
イ.en: Select test data so that all combinations of branch conditions are executed.

ウ.zh: 选择测试数据，使所有语句至少被执行一次。
ウ.en: Select test data so that every statement is executed at least once.

エ.zh: 将正常情况、错误情况等可能发生的事件分成若干组，选择测试数据，使每一组至少被执行一次。
エ.en: Divide possible events such as normal cases and error cases into several groups, and select test data so that each group is executed at least once.

stem.zh: 关于软件维护的描述，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of software maintenance?

ア.zh: 监视应用程序的错误。
ア.en: Monitoring errors in application programs.

イ.zh: 为解决系统投入运行后发生的故障而修改程序。
イ.en: Modifying programs to resolve failures in a system after it has gone into operation.

ウ.zh: 为提升系统性能而更换服务器。
ウ.en: Replacing servers to improve system performance.

エ.zh: 定期进行数据备份。
エ.en: Periodically taking data backups.

2014h26h-q037.stem_jp_clean: 情報システムの利用者対応のため, サービスデスクの導入を検討している。サービスデスクにおけるインシデントの受付や対応に関する記述のうち, 最も適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 为了应对信息系统的用户支持，正在考虑引入服务台。关于服务台对事件（incident）的受理和处理的描述，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: A service desk is being considered to handle support for information system users. Which of the following descriptions about receiving and handling incidents at the service desk is the most appropriate?

ア.zh: 对于用户报告的故障，在解决方法正式确定之前，不向用户提供任何信息。
ア.en: For a failure reported by a user, do not provide any information to the user until the solution is officially determined.

イ.zh: 对于用户报告的故障，处理时不以查明故障原因为重点，而以恢复服务为主要目标。
イ.en: For a failure reported by a user, handle it with the primary focus on restoring the service rather than on identifying the cause of the failure.

ウ.zh: 受理用户的咨询时，无论用户所在组织的情况如何，都统一为电子邮件、电话、传真等之中的某一种方式。
ウ.en: When receiving user inquiries, regardless of the situation of the user's organization, unify the channel to only one of email, telephone, fax, etc.

エ.zh: 对于用户的咨询，只记录那些无法立即解决的咨询。
エ.en: Among user inquiries, record only those that could not be resolved immediately.

2014h26h-q038.stem_jp_clean: プロジェクトの目的を達成するために, プロジェクトに参加する要員の役割と責任と必要なスキルを決定し, 参加時期も明確にした。この活動はプロジェクトマネジメントのどの知識エリアの活動か。

stem.zh: 为了达成项目目标，确定了参与项目的人员的角色、职责和所需技能，并明确了其参与时期。该活动属于项目管理中哪个知识领域的活动？
stem.en: To achieve the project's objectives, the roles, responsibilities, and required skills of the personnel participating in the project were determined, and their participation timing was also clarified. This activity belongs to which knowledge area of project management?

ア.zh: 项目沟通管理
ア.en: Project Communications Management

イ.zh: 项目范围管理
イ.en: Project Scope Management

ウ.zh: 项目时间管理
ウ.en: Project Time Management

エ.zh: 项目人力资源管理
エ.en: Project Human Resource Management

stem.zh:
为评估所构建的内部控制的完善状况，使用风险控制矩阵。关于风险控制矩阵使用方法的下列叙述中，填入 a、b 处字句的恰当组合是哪一个？

记述风险和 a，评估 b。
stem.en:
A risk control matrix is used to assess the state of internal controls that have been established. In the following description of how to use a risk control matrix, which is the appropriate combination of words to fill in a and b?

Describe the risks and a, then assess b.

ア.zh: a: 备选的控制项目 / b: 控制项目的经济性
ア.en: a: candidate control items / b: the economic efficiency of the control items

イ.zh: a: 备选的控制项目 / b: 风险的降低程度
イ.en: a: candidate control items / b: the degree of risk reduction

ウ.zh: a: 正在实施的控制项目 / b: 控制项目的经济性
ウ.en: a: control items being implemented / b: the economic efficiency of the control items

エ.zh: a: 正在实施的控制项目 / b: 风险的降低程度
エ.en: a: control items being implemented / b: the degree of risk reduction

stem.zh: 关于IT服务管理流程的说明中，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of an IT service management process?

ア.zh: 查明软件故障根本原因的是问题管理。
ア.en: Investigating the root cause of a software failure is problem management.

イ.zh: 决定软件是否需要变更的是发布管理。
イ.en: Deciding whether a software change is needed is release management.

ウ.zh: 管理软件版本的是事件管理。
ウ.en: Managing software versions is incident management.

エ.zh: 嵌入软件并进行运行确认的是变更管理。
エ.en: Incorporating software and confirming its operation is change management.

stem.zh: 表示系统能力或质量的指标有可用性、性能、数据一致性、可维护性等。关于可用性的描述，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Indicators that express a system's capability or quality include availability, performance, data consistency, and maintainability. Which of the following is an appropriate description of availability?

ア.zh: 将相关数据保持在具有一致性的状态
ア.en: Keeping related data in a consistent state

イ.zh: 从向系统下达指令到获得结果所需的时间
イ.en: The time from giving an instruction to the system until a result is obtained

ウ.zh: 即使系统发生故障，功能仍可被使用的程度
ウ.en: The degree to which functions can be used even when a failure occurs in the system

エ.zh: 程序变更的容易程度
エ.en: The degree of ease with which a program can be modified

stem.zh: 关于系统开发项目中创建 WBS 时进行的要素分解，下列说明中恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of the decomposition of elements when creating a WBS for a system development project?

ア.zh: 应当能够估算出创建系统开发交付物所需的成本和工时，并将其分解到可管理的程度，这样的要素分解是理想的。
ア.en: It is desirable to decompose elements down to a manageable level at which the cost and time required to produce the system development deliverables can be estimated and controlled.

イ.zh: 在对系统开发进行要素分解时，根据交付物是由承包方制作还是由本公司制作，将交付物的要素分解全部交由承包方负责。
イ.en: When decomposing the system development into elements, depending on whether the deliverables are produced by the contractor or in-house, the decomposition of the deliverables is entirely entrusted to the contractor.

ウ.zh: 由于项目的进度汇报会议是一种沟通手段，因此不将其作为要素分解的对象。
ウ.en: Since a project progress report meeting is a means of communication, it is not subject to element decomposition.

エ.zh: 如果有过类似系统的开发经验，就可以不必重新进行要素分解。
エ.en: If there is experience developing a similar system, it is not necessary to perform element decomposition anew.

stem.zh: 在系统需求定义中，作为评估系统需求的基准，最恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: In system requirements definition, which is an appropriate criterion for evaluating the system requirements?

ア.zh: 与系统集成测试结果的一致性
ア.en: Consistency with the results of system integration testing

イ.zh: 与系统委托方（发包方）需求的一致性
イ.en: Consistency with the needs of the system's client (the party placing the order)

ウ.zh: 所使用设计方法的恰当性
ウ.en: Appropriateness of the design method used

エ.zh: 测试用例的覆盖性
エ.en: Comprehensiveness of the test cases

2014h26h-q044.stem_jp_clean: システム開発プロジェクト遂行における品質管理を行うために, 開発工程の流れ図を作成した。当該流れ図の利用目的として, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 为了对系统开发项目执行过程进行质量管理，绘制了开发工序的流程图。该流程图的使用目的中，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: To perform quality control in carrying out a system development project, a flowchart of the development process was created. Which of the following is an appropriate purpose for using this flowchart?

ア.zh: 研究在工作流程的何处、可能发生何种问题。
ア.en: Examine where in the work process and what kinds of problems could occur.

イ.zh: 判断系统的使用率是否在预测的范围内。
イ.en: Determine whether the system's usage rate is within the predicted range.

ウ.zh: 明确项目执行中的重大问题与其潜在原因之间的关联。
ウ.en: Clarify the relationship between serious problems in project execution and their potential causes.

エ.zh: 为了着手解决引发最多问题的原因，掌握按问题原因划分的发生频率。
エ.en: Grasp the frequency of occurrence by cause of problems, in order to address the cause that generates the most problems.

2014h26h-q045.stem_jp_clean: 情報システムの安全性を維持・保全するための施策のうち, 情報システム設備の施策に該当するものはどれか。

stem.zh: 在维护和保全信息系统安全性的各项措施中，属于信息系统设备方面措施的是哪一项？
stem.en: Among the measures for maintaining and preserving the safety of an information system, which one corresponds to a measure for information system facilities?

ア.zh: 安装自备发电装置。
ア.en: Install an on-site generator.

イ.zh: 进行数据备份。
イ.en: Take backups of data.

ウ.zh: 设置在固定时间自动启动计算机的功能。
ウ.en: Provide a function that automatically starts the computer at a set time.

エ.zh: 对在网络上流动的数据进行加密。
エ.en: Encrypt the data flowing over the network.

2014h26h-q046.stem_jp_clean: プロジェクトマネジメントでは, コスト, 時間, 品質などをマネジメントすることが求められる。プロジェクトマネジメントに関する記述のうち, 適切なものはどれか。

stem.zh: 项目管理要求对成本、时间、质量等进行管理。关于项目管理的叙述中，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: Project management requires managing aspects such as cost, time, and quality. Which of the following statements about project management is appropriate?

ア.zh: 成本、时间、质量的优先级会因约束条件而不同，因此需要在三者之间取得平衡。
ア.en: The priorities of cost, time, and quality differ depending on the constraints, so they must be balanced against one another.

イ.zh: 成本、时间、质量各自相互独立，因此无需取得平衡。
イ.en: Cost, time, and quality are each independent of one another, so there is no need to balance them.

ウ.zh: 成本与质量成正比，因此只关注其中一方进行管理即可。
ウ.en: Cost and quality are directly proportional, so it is enough to manage just one of them.

エ.zh: 成本与时间成反比，因此只关注其中一方进行管理即可。
エ.en: Cost and time are inversely proportional, so it is enough to manage just one of them.

stem.zh: 关于逆向工程的说明，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is an appropriate description of reverse engineering?

ア.zh: 通过巧妙地组合需要确认的多个因素，以尽可能少的实验次数高效地实施实验的方法。
ア.en: A method that efficiently conducts experiments with as few trials as possible by cleverly combining multiple factors that need to be verified.

イ.zh: 通过拆解并分析已有的产品，弄清该产品的结构从而获取其技术的方法。
イ.en: A method that dismantles and analyzes an existing product to clarify its structure and thereby acquire its technology.

ウ.zh: 在不改变业务内容的前提下，通过从根本上重新审视工作流程和方法，将业务转变为最理想形态的方法。
ウ.en: A method that, without changing the business content, fundamentally rethinks workflows and methods to transform operations into their most desirable form.

エ.zh: 在从产品开发到生产的作业工序中，通过并行推进可以同时进行的作业来缩短工期的方法。
エ.en: A method that shortens the schedule by carrying out tasks that can be done simultaneously in parallel, throughout the work process from product development to production.

stem.zh: SLA 中记载服务提供方与服务使用方之间就服务内容等达成一致的约定。通过签订 SLA，服务提供方与服务使用方双方都能获得的好处，恰当的是哪一项？
stem.en: An SLA records agreements such as the service content agreed upon between the service provider and the service user. Which of the following is an appropriate benefit obtained by both the service provider and the service user from concluding an SLA?

ア.zh: 能够基于服务的实际内容来证明收费金额的合理性。
ア.en: They can justify the validity of the charged fees based on the actual content of the service.

イ.zh: 能够对服务的内容、提供范围、要求水准形成共同认识。
イ.en: They can share a common understanding regarding the content, scope of provision, and required levels of the service.

ウ.zh: 在服务内容不充分的情况下，能够要求重新审定收费金额。
ウ.en: When the service content is insufficient, they can request a review of the fees.

エ.zh: 无需接受关于服务内容的恰当要求即可执行业务。
エ.en: They can carry out the work without receiving appropriate requests regarding the service content.

stem.zh: 关于系统开发各个阶段中实施的内容，下列哪一项是恰当的？
stem.en: Which of the following is appropriate regarding the work carried out in each phase of system development?

ア.zh: 外部设计阶段研究画面和报表的项目。
ア.en: In external design, the items of screens and reports are examined.

イ.zh: 测试阶段进行设计文档的评审，并通过桌面检查确认系统的运行。
イ.en: In testing, design documents are reviewed and the system's behavior is checked by desk-checking.

ウ.zh: 编程阶段确认由最终用户进行的系统操作步骤。
ウ.en: In programming, the system operation procedures performed by end users are confirmed.

エ.zh: 项目执行计划阶段研究系统的内部处理。
エ.en: In the project execution plan, the internal processing of the system is examined.

stem.zh: 在系统审计所需的流程中，由系统审计人员实施的是哪一项？
stem.en: Among the processes required for a systems audit, which one is carried out by the systems auditor?

ア.zh: 整备与审计对象的业务等相关的运行规则
ア.en: Establishing the operational rules related to the business and other matters that are the audit target

イ.zh: 对审计对象进行预备调查
イ.en: Conducting a preliminary survey of the audit target

ウ.zh: 改善审计对象的脆弱性
ウ.en: Improving the vulnerabilities of the audit target

エ.zh: 受理系统审计报告书
エ.en: Receiving the systems audit report

stem.zh: 破解密码的方法之一是逐一尝试所有字符组合的暴力破解攻击。在一个可以使用从"0"到"9"这10种字符的密码中，将位数从4位增加到6位时，用暴力破解攻击破解密码所需的最大尝试次数会变为原来的多少倍？
stem.en: One method of cracking a password is the brute-force attack, which tries every possible combination of characters. For a password that can use the 10 characters from "0" to "9", if the number of digits is increased from 4 to 6, by what factor does the maximum number of attempts needed to crack the password by a brute-force attack increase?

2014h26h-q052.stem_jp_clean: 通信事業者が自社のWANを利用して、顧客の遠く離れた複数拠点のLAN同士を、ルータを使用せずに直接相互接続させるサービスはどれか。

stem.zh: 电信运营商利用自有的广域网（WAN），将客户相距遥远的多个站点的局域网（LAN）之间，不使用路由器而直接相互连接起来，这是哪种服务？
stem.en: A telecom carrier uses its own WAN to directly interconnect the LANs of a customer's geographically distant sites without using routers. Which service is this?

ア.zh: ISDN
ア.en: ISDN

イ.zh: PoE（以太网供电，Power over Ethernet）
イ.en: PoE (Power over Ethernet)

ウ.zh: 互联网

2014h26h-q068.stem_jp_clean:
図に示す階層構造において、カレントディレクトリが＊印のディレクトリであるとき、相対パス指定で“..￥..￥B￥B”によって指定したディレクトリと同じディレクトリを絶対パス指定したものはどれか。

〔ディレクトリ及びファイルの指定方法〕
(1) ファイルは、“ディレクトリ名￥…￥ディレクトリ名￥ファイル名”のように、経路上のディレクトリを順に“￥”で区切って並べた後に“￥”とファイル名を指定する。
(2) カレントディレクトリは“.”で表す。
(3) 1階層上のディレクトリは“..”で表す。
(4) 始まりが“￥”のときは、左端にルートディレクトリが省略されているものとする。
(5) 始まりが“￥”、“.”、“..”のいずれでもないときは、左端にカレントディレクトリ配下であることを示す“.￥”が省略されているものとする。

stem.zh:
在图所示的层次结构中，当前目录为标有＊号的目录时，用相对路径指定“..￥..￥B￥B”所指定的目录，与下列哪个绝对路径指定的目录相同？

〔目录及文件的指定方法〕
(1) 文件按“目录名￥…￥目录名￥文件名”的形式指定，即把路径上的各目录依次用“￥”分隔排列后，再加上“￥”和文件名。
(2) 当前目录用“.”表示。
(3) 上一层目录用“..”表示。
(4) 当开头为“￥”时，认为其左端省略了根目录。
(5) 当开头既不是“￥”、也不是“.”、也不是“..”时，认为其左端省略了表示位于当前目录之下的“.￥”。
stem.en:
In the hierarchical structure shown in the figure, when the current directory is the one marked with ＊, which absolute path specifies the same directory as the relative path "..￥..￥B￥B"?

[How to specify directories and files]
(1) A file is specified as "directory name￥…￥directory name￥file name": the directories along the path are listed in order separated by "￥", followed by "￥" and the file name.
(2) The current directory is represented by ".".
(3) The directory one level up is represented by "..".
(4) When a specification begins with "￥", the root directory is assumed to be omitted at the left end.
(5) When a specification begins with none of "￥", ".", or "..", the ".￥" indicating that it is under the current directory is assumed to be omitted at the left end.

ア.zh: ￥A￥B￥B
ア.en: ￥A￥B￥B

イ.zh: ￥B
イ.en: ￥B

ウ.zh: ￥B￥B
ウ.en: ￥B￥B

エ.zh: ￥B￥B￥B
エ.en: ￥B￥B￥B

2014h26h-q087.stem_jp_clean:
電話受付センタのオペレータの勤務形態を、図2に示すように勤務時間によって四つのパターンに分けている。Yさんは、電話受付センタを集約することによって削減可能なオペレータの人数を試算することにした。表1のように、電話受付センタ集約後に時間帯A～Dの各時間帯で最低限必要な人数を設定したとき、オペレータに掛かる費用を最小化するために考慮すべき条件として、適切でないものはどれか。

〔前提〕
(1) オペレータ1人に掛かる費用は、"時間給×勤務時間"で算出する。
(2) オペレータの時間給は、どの勤務パターンでも同じである。
(3) どの勤務パターンでも最低1人はオペレータがいるものとする。

図2 勤務時間別パターン一覧（時間帯A:9～11、時間帯B:12～14、時間帯C:15～17、時間帯D:18～20。勤務パターン1はP1人、勤務パターン2はP2人、勤務パターン3はP3人、勤務パターン4はP4人。各時間帯で勤務中のオペレータの人数は、時間帯Aでは P1、時間帯Bでは P1+P2、時間帯Cでは P1+P2+P3、時間帯Dでは P2+P3+P4 となる。P1～P4は勤務パターンごとのオペレータの人数である。）

| | 時間帯A | 時間帯B | 時間帯C | 時間帯D |
|---|---|---|---|---|

stem.zh:
电话受理中心的话务员（接线员）的工作形态，如图2所示按工作时段分为四种模式。Y先生打算试算通过整合电话受理中心可以削减的话务员人数。如表1所示，在电话受理中心整合后为时段A～D的各时段设定最低所需人数时，为使话务员产生的费用最小化而应考虑的条件中，不恰当的是哪一项？

〔前提〕
(1) 每名话务员产生的费用，按"时薪×工作时间"计算。
(2) 话务员的时薪，在任何一种工作模式下都相同。
(3) 假定在任何一种工作模式下都至少有1名话务员。

图2 按工作时段划分的模式一览（时段A：9～11时、时段B：12～14时、时段C：15～17时、时段D：18～20时。工作模式1为P1人、工作模式2为P2人、工作模式3为P3人、工作模式4为P4人。各时段在岗话务员人数为：时段A为P1、时段B为P1+P2、时段C为P1+P2+P3、时段D为P2+P3+P4。P1～P4为各工作模式的话务员人数。）

表1 各时段的最低所需人数

| | 时段A | 时段B | 时段C | 时段D |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 最低所需人数 | Q1 | Q2 | Q3 | Q4 |

注 Q1～Q4为各时段的最低所需人数。
stem.en:
The work schedules of operators at a telephone reception center are divided into four patterns by working hours, as shown in Figure 2. Ms. Y plans to estimate the number of operators that can be reduced by consolidating the telephone reception centers. As shown in Table 1, when the minimum number of operators required is set for each of the time periods A through D after consolidating the telephone reception centers, which of the following is NOT an appropriate condition to consider in order to minimize the cost of operators?

[Premises]
(1) The cost per operator is calculated as "hourly wage x working hours."
(2) The hourly wage of an operator is the same for every work pattern.
(3) Assume that there is at least one operator in every work pattern.

Figure 2: List of patterns by working hours (Time period A: 9-11, Time period B: 12-14, Time period C: 15-17, Time period D: 18-20. Work pattern 1 has P1 operators, pattern 2 has P2, pattern 3 has P3, pattern 4 has P4. The number of operators on duty in each time period is: A = P1, B = P1+P2, C = P1+P2+P3, D = P2+P3+P4. P1 to P4 are the numbers of operators for each work pattern.)

Table 1: Minimum required number of operators by time period

| | Time period A | Time period B | Time period C | Time period D |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Minimum required number | Q1 | Q2 | Q3 | Q4 |

Note: Q1 to Q4 are the minimum required numbers of operators for each time period.

ア.zh: 使 P1～P4 都为 1 以上
ア.en: Each of P1 to P4 should be 1 or greater.

イ.zh: 使 P1～P4 的合计大于 Q1～Q4 的合计
イ.en: The sum of P1 to P4 should be greater than the sum of Q1 to Q4.

ウ.zh: 使各工作模式的"时薪×工作时间×人数"的总和最小
ウ.en: The total of "hourly wage x working hours x number of operators" for each work pattern should be minimized.

エ.zh: 使各时段在岗话务员人数满足最低所需人数
エ.en: The number of operators on duty in each time period should satisfy the minimum required number.

问88 M公司计划设立的特卖专区，在节目播出时间内能够介绍的商品仅限于2种。需要从商品A～D中选出能使利润最大化的组合。为此，Y先生从销售部门获取了表2，该表给出了每种商品每天可销售的数量、每件商品的利润以及每小时的预计订单数。
　据称，在特卖专区介绍的商品，仅在该节目播出结束后的2小时以内接受订购。能使利润最大化的商品组合是哪一个？

表2　候选商品的数量与利润

| 商品名 | 每天可销售的数量 | 每件的利润（万日元） | 每小时的预计订单数 |
|--------|------------------|----------------------|--------------------|
| A | 90 | 1 | 60 |
| B | 50 | 2 | 40 |
| C | 40 | 3 | 20 |
| D | 25 | 4 | 10 |

[Strategy]
Q88 A special-sale corner planned by Company M can introduce only 2 types of products during the broadcast time. From products A to D, the combination that maximizes profit must be selected. For this purpose, Mr. Y obtained Table 2 from the sales department, which shows, for each product, the quantity that can be sold per day, the profit per unit, and the expected number of orders per hour.
　It is said that, for products introduced at the special-sale corner, orders will be accepted only within 2 hours after the end of this program. Which combination of products maximizes profit?

Table 2  Quantity and profit of candidate products

| Product name | Quantity that can be sold per day | Profit per unit (10,000 yen) | Expected number of orders per hour |
|--------|------------------|----------------------|--------------------|
| A | 90 | 1 | 60 |
| B | 50 | 2 | 40 |
| C | 40 | 3 | 20 |
| D | 25 | 4 | 10 |

ア.zh: 商品A与商品B
ア.en: Product A and Product B

イ.zh: 商品A与商品D
イ.en: Product A and Product D

ウ.zh: 商品B与商品C
ウ.en: Product B and Product C

エ.zh: 商品C与商品D
エ.en: Product C and Product D

stem.zh: 对于产品 H，方案 A 与方案 B 中哪一个的制造成本更低，取决于产品 H 的制造台数。当每月制造台数超过多少台时，方案 B 的制造成本会低于方案 A 的制造成本？
stem.en: Which of plan A or plan B yields a lower manufacturing cost for product H depends on the number of units of product H manufactured. When the monthly number of units manufactured exceeds how many units does the manufacturing cost of plan B become lower than that of plan A?

2014h26h-q090.stem_jp_clean:
製品Hには, 社外から仕入れている部品Jが使われている。この部品Jの仕入価格が来月から値上がりする可能性が出てきた。部品Jが値上がりし, 製造方法として案Bを採用する場合, 図1の製造台数と製造原価のグラフはどのようになるか。
ここで, 元の製造台数と製造原価の関係を実線で, 部品Jの仕入価格が値上がりした場合の関係を破線で示す。

stem.zh:
产品H中使用了从外部采购的零件J。该零件J的采购价格从下月起有可能上涨。当零件J涨价并采用方案B作为制造方法时，图1中制造台数与制造成本的关系图会变成怎样？
这里，用实线表示原来的制造台数与制造成本的关系，用虚线表示零件J采购价格上涨后的关系。
stem.en:
Product H uses part J, which is purchased from an external supplier. The purchase price of this part J may rise starting next month. When part J's price rises and manufacturing method B (plan B) is adopted, how does the graph of number of units manufactured versus manufacturing cost in Figure 1 change?
Here, the original relationship between number of units manufactured and manufacturing cost is shown by a solid line, and the relationship after part J's purchase price rises is shown by a dashed line.

ア.zh: （图ア：虚线比实线斜率更大、截距相同）
ア.en: (Graph A: the dashed line has a larger slope than the solid line, same intercept)

イ.zh: （图イ：虚线与实线斜率相同、截距相同）
イ.en: (Graph B: the dashed line has the same slope as the solid line, same intercept)

ウ.zh: （图ウ：虚线与实线斜率相同、截距更高）
ウ.en: (Graph C: the dashed line has the same slope as the solid line, higher intercept)

エ.zh: （图エ：虚线比实线斜率更小、截距更高）
エ.en: (Graph D: the dashed line has a smaller slope than the solid line, higher intercept)

2014h26h-q091.stem_jp_clean: G社は, 製品Hの製造方法の案Aについて, 販売計画のシミュレーションを行った。案Aの製造方法で月間499台製造する場合, 月間の売上総利益を2,090万円確保するための販売価格は最低何円にする必要があるか。ここで, 月内に製造した製品は全て月内に販売できるものとする。

stem.zh: G公司就产品H的制造方案A进行了销售计划的模拟。当采用方案A的制造方法每月生产499台时，为确保每月的销售毛利润达到2,090万日元，销售价格最低需要定为多少日元？此处假设当月制造的产品全部能在当月售出。
stem.en: Company G ran a sales plan simulation for manufacturing method Plan A of Product H. When 499 units are manufactured per month using the Plan A manufacturing method, what is the minimum selling price (in yen) required to secure a monthly gross profit of 20,900,000 yen? Assume that all products manufactured within a month can be sold within that month.

2014h26h-q092.stem_jp_clean:
G社は, 製品Hの製造方法の案Bについて, 販売計画のシミュレーションを行った。案Bの製造方法で〔月間利益計画〕を満たす最低限の台数を製造するとき, 売上総利益率は何%か。ここで, 月内に製造した製品は全て月内に販売できるものとする。
〔月間利益計画〕
(1) 製品Hの販売価格は, 1台19万円とする。
(2) 月間の売上総利益は, 2,000万円とする。

stem.zh:
G公司针对产品H的制造方法方案B，进行了销售计划的模拟。当采用方案B的制造方法、制造满足〔月度利润计划〕的最低数量时，销售毛利率是百分之多少？此处假设月内制造的产品全部能在月内售出。
〔月度利润计划〕
(1) 产品H的销售价格为每台19万日元。
(2) 月度销售毛利润为2,000万日元。
stem.en:
Company G ran a sales plan simulation for manufacturing method Plan B of product H. When manufacturing the minimum number of units that satisfies the [Monthly Profit Plan] using the Plan B manufacturing method, what is the gross profit margin (%)? Assume that all products manufactured within the month can be sold within the month.
[Monthly Profit Plan]
(1) The selling price of product H is 190,000 yen per unit.
(2) The monthly gross profit is 20,000,000 yen.

2014h26h-q095.stem_jp_clean: 稟議システムを用いた申請の流れは, 通常 (1)〜(6) の順番で行われるが, 分岐して流れが変わる場合がある。次のうち, 流れが変わる処理はどれか。

stem.zh: 使用审批（稟議）系统进行申请的流程通常按 (1)〜(6) 的顺序进行，但有时会因分支而改变流程。下列各项中，会改变流程的处理是哪一个？

stem.zh: 根据图1所示迁移作业的箭线图来实施作业时，迁移作业最短需要多少小时才能完成？
stem.en: When the work is carried out based on the arrow diagram of the migration work shown in Figure 1, what is the shortest time, in hours, in which the migration work can be completed?

2014h26h-q098.stem_jp_clean:
〔マネジメント〕
移行プロジェクトでは移行作業で考えられるリスクを洗い出し、発生確率の大きなリスクに対して対策を講じることにした。Aさんは複数のリスクから発生確率が大きな四つのリスクW～Zを選び、発生確率、低減できる影響額及び影響額を低減するための対策に要するコストを表1にまとめ、その上で次に示す〔移行プロジェクトでまとめた優先順位付けの指針〕を付けることにした。aに入れる適切な優先順位はどれか。ここで、優先順位には高いものから低い順に1～4を記入する。

〔移行プロジェクトでまとめた優先順位付けの指針〕
（1）低減できる影響額に発生確率を乗じた値から、対策に要するコストを引いた値の大きなものを優先する。
（2）（1）で求めた値が同じであれば、対策に要するコストが小さいものを優先する。

表1 リスクの発生確率、低減できる影響額及び対策に要するコスト

| リスク | 発生確率 | 低減できる影響額 | 対策に要するコスト | 優先順位 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| W | 0.3 | 500 | 50 | a |
| X | 0.2 | 1,000 | 100 |  |
| Y | 0.1 | 3,000 | 200 |  |
| Z | 0.1 | 5,000 | 200 |  |

注記　網掛けの部分は、表示していない。

stem.zh:
〔管理〕
在迁移项目中，要梳理出迁移作业中可能出现的风险，并对发生概率较大的风险采取应对措施。A 先生从多个风险中选出发生概率较大的四个风险 W～Z，将其发生概率、可降低的影响金额，以及为降低影响金额所需的应对措施成本汇总于表 1，并在此基础上附加了下面所示的〔迁移项目所归纳的优先级排定方针〕。请问应填入 a 的适当优先级是哪一个？这里，优先级按从高到低依次填入 1～4。

〔迁移项目所归纳的优先级排定方针〕
（1）将可降低的影响金额乘以发生概率所得的值，再减去应对措施所需的成本，取所得值较大者优先。
（2）若（1）中求得的值相同，则取应对措施所需成本较小者优先。

表 1　风险的发生概率、可降低的影响金额及应对措施所需的成本

| 风险 | 发生概率 | 可降低的影响金额 | 应对措施所需成本 | 优先级 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| W | 0.3 | 500 | 50 | a |
| X | 0.2 | 1,000 | 100 |  |
| Y | 0.1 | 3,000 | 200 |  |
| Z | 0.1 | 5,000 | 200 |  |

注：阴影部分未予显示。
stem.en:
[Management]
In a migration project, the team decided to identify the risks that could arise during the migration work and to take countermeasures against risks with a high probability of occurrence. Mr. A selected the four risks W to Z with the highest probabilities of occurrence from among multiple risks, and summarized their probability of occurrence, the amount of impact that can be reduced, and the cost required for the countermeasure to reduce the impact amount, in Table 1. He then added the following [Guideline for prioritization compiled for the migration project]. Which is the appropriate priority to enter in a? Here, priorities are entered as 1 to 4, from highest priority to lowest.

[Guideline for prioritization compiled for the migration project]
(1) Prioritize the one with the larger value obtained by multiplying the amount of impact that can be reduced by the probability of occurrence, and then subtracting the cost required for the countermeasure.
(2) If the values obtained in (1) are the same, prioritize the one with the smaller cost required for the countermeasure.

Table 1: Probability of occurrence of each risk, amount of impact that can be reduced, and cost required for the countermeasure

| Risk | Probability of occurrence | Amount of impact that can be reduced | Cost required for countermeasure | Priority |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| W | 0.3 | 500 | 50 | a |
| X | 0.2 | 1,000 | 100 |  |
| Y | 0.1 | 3,000 | 200 |  |
| Z | 0.1 | 5,000 | 200 |  |

Note: The shaded portion is not displayed.

2014h26h-q099.stem_jp_clean:
〔マネジメント〕
問99　移行プロジェクトで作成した図に示す移行作業のアローダイアグラムに対して，Aさんは次の指示を受けた。

〔Aさんが受けた指示〕
(1)　W4　移行作業の完了判定を行い，正しく完了しなかった場合，バックアップ媒体から移行作業の状態に復旧して業務を継続する。復旧作業には4.0時間を要する。
(2)　復旧作業を合わせて，当初の作業時間内に収める必要がある。

そこで，復旧作業の時間を確保するために，各作業の担当者にインタビューを実施し，対策案とその効果を，表2に示す。この記述中の b，c に入れる適切な組合せはどれか。

復旧作業の時間を確保するための対策案の組合せは， b と c である。

表2　対策案1〜4に対する作業時間短縮効果

| 対策案 | 効果 |
|---|---|
| 1 | S1の作業時間が1/4になる。 |
| 2 | S3の作業時間が0に，W3の作業時間が3.0時間になる。 |
| 3 | W1の作業時間が1/4になる。 |
| 4 | W4の作業時間が1/2になる。 |

stem.zh:
〔管理〕
问99　针对迁移项目中制作的、如图所示的迁移作业的箭线图，A收到了如下指示。

〔A收到的指示〕
(1)　W4　进行迁移作业的完成判定，若未能正确完成，则从备份介质恢复到迁移作业的状态并继续业务。恢复作业需要4.0小时。
(2)　包含恢复作业在内，必须控制在最初的作业时间之内。

为此，为了确保恢复作业的时间，对各项作业的负责人进行了访谈，将对策方案及其效果列于表2。填入该描述中 b、c 处的恰当组合是哪一项？

确保恢复作业时间的对策方案组合为 b 和 c。

表2　对策方案1~4的作业时间缩短效果

| 对策方案 | 效果 |
|---|---|
| 1 | S1的作业时间变为1/4。 |
| 2 | S3的作业时间变为0，W3的作业时间变为3.0小时。 |
| 3 | W1的作业时间变为1/4。 |
| 4 | W4的作业时间变为1/2。 |
stem.en:
[Management]
Q99　For the arrow diagram of the migration tasks shown in the figure created in the migration project, Mr. A received the following instructions.

[Instructions Mr. A received]
(1)　W4　Perform the completion check of the migration task; if it does not complete correctly, restore from the backup medium to the migration-task state and continue operations. The recovery task requires 4.0 hours.
(2)　Including the recovery task, it must fit within the original task time.

Therefore, to secure time for the recovery task, interviews were conducted with the person in charge of each task, and the countermeasure proposals and their effects are shown in Table 2. Which is the appropriate combination to fill in b and c in this description?

The combination of countermeasure proposals to secure time for the recovery task is b and c.

Table 2　Task-time reduction effects of countermeasure proposals 1 to 4

| Countermeasure proposal | Effect |
|---|---|
| 1 | The task time of S1 becomes 1/4. |
| 2 | The task time of S3 becomes 0, and the task time of W3 becomes 3.0 hours. |
| 3 | The task time of W1 becomes 1/4. |
| 4 | The task time of W4 becomes 1/2. |

ア.zh: b: 对策方案1 ／ c: 对策方案2
ア.en: b: Countermeasure proposal 1 / c: Countermeasure proposal 2

イ.zh: b: 对策方案1 ／ c: 对策方案4
イ.en: b: Countermeasure proposal 1 / c: Countermeasure proposal 4

ウ.zh: b: 对策方案2 ／ c: 对策方案4
ウ.en: b: Countermeasure proposal 2 / c: Countermeasure proposal 4

エ.zh: b: 对策方案3 ／ c: 对策方案4
エ.en: b: Countermeasure proposal 3 / c: Countermeasure proposal 4

stem.zh:
A先生决定将整合到品牌M销售管理系统客户表中的客户数据件数，作为判定迁移作业是否正确完成的基准之一。为此，他在迁移作业前调查了各个销售管理系统，得到了如下结果。迁移作业后的客户数据共有多少件？
(1) 品牌S的客户表中登记了2,900件客户数据。
(2) 品牌M的客户表的客户编码是由0～9的数字构成的6位字符串，第6位是校验位（check digit）。目前，从客户编码的角度看，可登记的数据件数中已登记了5%。
(3) 品牌M的客户表中登记的件数的10%同时也登记在品牌S的客户表中，因此这部分客户数据不从品牌S的客户表迁移过来。
stem.en:
Mr. A decided to use the number of customer data records consolidated into the customer table of Brand M's sales management system as one of the criteria for judging whether the migration work was completed correctly. He therefore investigated each sales management system before the migration and obtained the following results. How many customer data records will there be after the migration?
(1) Brand S's customer table has 2,900 customer data records registered.
(2) The customer code in Brand M's customer table is a 6-digit string composed of the digits 0 to 9, and the 6th digit is a check digit. Currently, from the standpoint of the customer code, 5% of the number of records that can be registered are registered.
(3) Since 10% of the records registered in Brand M's customer table are also registered in Brand S's customer table, these customer data records will not be migrated from Brand S's customer table.
